problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Federated learning without data centralization is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Theoretical complexity proof with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
